instrument_log.c(3) Library Functions Manual instrument_log.c(3)

NAME

instrument_log.c

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct asciichat_instr_only_selector
Selector for filtering instrumentation output by file, function, or module. struct asciichat_instr_only_list
Dynamic array of instrumentation selectors for filtering output. struct asciichat_instr_runtime
Per-thread instrumentation runtime state.

Macros


#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_HAVE_REGEX 1
#define posix_write write
#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_DEFAULT_BASENAME 'ascii-instr'
#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_LINE 4096
#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_SNIPPET 2048

Typedefs


typedef enum asciichat_instr_selector_type asciichat_instr_selector_type_t
typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_selector asciichat_instr_only_selector_t
Selector for filtering instrumentation output by file, function, or module. typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_list asciichat_instr_only_list_t
Dynamic array of instrumentation selectors for filtering output. typedef struct asciichat_instr_runtime asciichat_instr_runtime_t
Per-thread instrumentation runtime state.

Enumerations


enum asciichat_instr_selector_type { ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FILE_SUBSTRING = 0, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FILE_GLOB = 1, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FUNCTION_GLOB = 2, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_MODULE = 3 }

Functions


asciichat_instr_runtime_t * asciichat_instr_runtime_get (void)
void asciichat_instr_runtime_destroy (asciichat_instr_runtime_t *runtime)
void asciichat_instr_runtime_global_destroy (void)
void asciichat_instr_log_line (const char *file_path, uint32_t line_number, const char *function_name, const char *snippet, uint8_t is_macro_expansion)
bool asciichat_instr_coverage_enabled (void)
void asciichat_instr_log_pc (uintptr_t program_counter)

Typedef Documentation

typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_list asciichat_instr_only_list_t

Dynamic array of instrumentation selectors for filtering output.

typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_selector asciichat_instr_only_selector_t

Selector for filtering instrumentation output by file, function, or module.

typedef struct asciichat_instr_runtime asciichat_instr_runtime_t

Per-thread instrumentation runtime state. Tracks state for source code instrumentation logging, including file descriptors, filter configuration, and rate limiting for the current thread.

typedef enum asciichat_instr_selector_type asciichat_instr_selector_type_t

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum asciichat_instr_selector_type

Enumerator

ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FILE_SUBSTRING
ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FILE_GLOB
ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FUNCTION_GLOB
ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_MODULE

69   ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FILE_SUBSTRING = 0,

71   ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FUNCTION_GLOB = 2,
72   ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_MODULE = 3,
73 } asciichat_instr_selector_type_t;










Function
  Documentation




bool asciichat_instr_coverage_enabled (void )


Definition at line 415 of file instrument_log.c.


415                                             {
416   if (g_disable_write) {
417     return false;
418   }
419 
420   // Initialize runtime once using lock-free lifecycle API
421   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_runtime_lc)) {
422     if (lifecycle_init_once(&g_runtime_lc)) {
423       asciichat_instr_runtime_init_once();
424       lifecycle_init_commit(&g_runtime_lc);
425     }
426   }
427 
428   return g_coverage_enabled;
429 }






References lifecycle_init_commit(),
    lifecycle_init_once(), and lifecycle_is_initialized().


Referenced by asciichat_instr_log_pc().






void
  asciichat_instr_log_line (const char * file_path, uint32_t line_number, const
  char * function_name, const char * snippet, uint8_t
  is_macro_expansion)


Definition at line 265 of file instrument_log.c.


266                                                                                {
267   // Instrumentation is enabled by default when the binary is built with Source Print.
268   // Set ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_ENABLE=0 to disable tracing at runtime.
269   if (!g_instrumentation_enabled_checked) {
270     const char *enable_env = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_ENABLE");
271     // Default to enabled (true) - only disable if explicitly set to "0", "false", "off", or "no"
272     if (enable_env != NULL && enable_env[0] != '\0') {
273       g_instrumentation_enabled = asciichat_instr_env_is_enabled(enable_env);
274     } else {
275       g_instrumentation_enabled = true; // Default to enabled when instrumented
276     }
277     g_instrumentation_enabled_checked = true;
278   }
279 
280   if (!g_instrumentation_enabled) {
281     return;
282   }
283 
284   if (g_disable_write) {
285     return;
286   }
287 
288   if (g_logging_reentry_guard) {
289     return;
290   }
291 
292   g_logging_reentry_guard = true;
293 
294   asciichat_instr_runtime_t *runtime = asciichat_instr_runtime_get();
295   if (runtime == NULL) {
296     goto cleanup;
297   }
298 
299   if (!asciichat_instr_should_log(runtime, file_path, line_number, function_name)) {
300     goto cleanup;
301   }
302 
303   runtime->call_counter++;
304   if (runtime->rate_enabled) {
305     const uint64_t counter = runtime->call_counter;
306     if (((counter - 1U) % runtime->rate) != 0U) {
307       goto cleanup;
308     }
309   }
310 
311   if (runtime->fd < 0) {
312     if (asciichat_instr_open_log_file(runtime) != 0) {
313       runtime->stderr_fallback = true;
314     }
315   }
316 
317   const int fd = runtime->stderr_fallback ? STDERR_FILENO : runtime->fd;
318   char buffer[ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_LINE];
319   size_t pos = 0;
320 
321   uint64_t realtime_ns = time_get_realtime_ns();
322   time_t sec = (time_t)(realtime_ns / NS_PER_SEC_INT);
323   long nsec = (long)(realtime_ns % NS_PER_SEC_INT);
324   struct tm tm_now;
325   memset(&tm_now, 0, sizeof(tm_now));
326   if (platform_gtime(&sec, &tm_now) != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
327     memset(&tm_now, 0, sizeof(tm_now));
328   }
329 
330   char timestamp[32];
331   size_t ts_len = strftime(timestamp, sizeof(timestamp), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S", &tm_now);
332   if (ts_len == 0) {
333     SAFE_STRNCPY(timestamp, "1970-01-01T00:00:00", sizeof(timestamp));
334     ts_len = strlen(timestamp);
335   }
336 
337   char elapsed_buf[32];
338   elapsed_buf[0] = '\0';
339   if (g_ticks_initialized) {
340     uint64_t now_ns = time_get_ns();
341     uint64_t elapsed_ns = time_elapsed_ns(g_start_ns, now_ns);
342     if (time_pretty((uint64_t)elapsed_ns, -1, elapsed_buf, sizeof(elapsed_buf)) < 0) {
343       elapsed_buf[0] = '\0';
344     }
345   }
346 
347   runtime->sequence++;
348 
349   const char *elapsed_field = (elapsed_buf[0] != '\0') ? elapsed_buf : "-";
350 
351   const char *safe_file_path = (file_path != NULL) ? file_path : "<unknown>";
352   pos += safe_snprintf(buffer + pos, sizeof(buffer) - pos,
353                        "pid=%d tid=%llu seq=%llu ts=%.*s.%09ldZ elapsed=%s file=%s line=%u func=%s macro=%u snippet=",
354                        runtime->pid, (unsigned long long)runtime->thread_id, (unsigned long long)runtime->sequence,
355                        (int)ts_len, timestamp, nsec, elapsed_field, safe_file_path, line_number,
356                        function_name ? function_name : "<unknown>", (unsigned)is_macro_expansion);
357 
358   if (snippet != NULL) {
359     size_t snippet_len = strnlen(snippet, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_SNIPPET);
360     for (size_t i = 0; i < snippet_len && pos < sizeof(buffer) - 2; ++i) {
361       const char ch = snippet[i];
362       switch (ch) {
363       case '\n':
364         buffer[pos++] = '\\';
365         buffer[pos++] = 'n';
366         break;
367       case '\r':
368         buffer[pos++] = '\\';
369         buffer[pos++] = 'r';
370         break;
371       case '\t':
372         buffer[pos++] = '\\';
373         buffer[pos++] = 't';
374         break;
375       default:
376         buffer[pos++] = ch;
377         break;
378       }
379     }
380   }
381 
382   if (pos >= sizeof(buffer) - 1) {
383     pos = sizeof(buffer) - 2;
384   }
385 
386   buffer[pos++] = '\n';
387   buffer[pos] = '\0';
388 
389   asciichat_instr_write_full(fd, buffer, pos);
390 
391   // Also echo to stderr if requested via environment variable
392   if (!g_echo_to_stderr_initialized) {
393     const char *echo_env = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_CHAT_DEBUG_SELF_SOURCE_CODE_LOG_STDERR");
394     g_echo_to_stderr = asciichat_instr_env_is_enabled(echo_env);
395     g_echo_to_stderr_initialized = true;
396   }
397 
398   if (g_echo_to_stderr && !runtime->stderr_fallback) {
399     // Write to stderr in addition to the log file
400     // Suppress Windows deprecation warning for POSIX write function
401 #ifdef _WIN32
402 #pragma clang diagnostic push
403 #pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wdeprecated-declarations"
404 #endif
405     (void)posix_write(STDERR_FILENO, buffer, pos);
406 #ifdef _WIN32
407 #pragma clang diagnostic pop
408 #endif
409   }
410 
411 cleanup:
412   g_logging_reentry_guard = false;
413 }

    asciichat_instr_runtime_get(),

Referenced by asciichat_instr_log_pc().






void
  asciichat_instr_log_pc (uintptr_t program_counter)


Definition at line 431 of file instrument_log.c.


431                                                        {
432   if (!asciichat_instr_coverage_enabled()) {
433     return;
434   }
435 
436   char snippet[64];
437   safe_snprintf(snippet, sizeof(snippet), "pc=0x%zx", (size_t)program_counter);
438   asciichat_instr_log_line("__coverage__", 0, "<coverage>", snippet, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MACRO_NONE);
439 }






References asciichat_instr_coverage_enabled(),
    asciichat_instr_log_line(), and safe_snprintf().

void
  asciichat_instr_runtime_destroy (asciichat_instr_runtime_t *
  runtime)


Definition at line 213 of file instrument_log.c.


213                                                                          {
214   if (runtime == NULL) {
215     return;
216   }
217 
218   if (runtime->fd >= 0) {
219     platform_close(runtime->fd);
220     runtime->fd = -1;
221   }
222 
223 #if ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_HAVE_REGEX
224   if (runtime->include_regex_valid) {
225     regfree(&runtime->include_regex);
226     runtime->include_regex_valid = false;
227   }
228   if (runtime->exclude_regex_valid) {
229     regfree(&runtime->exclude_regex);
230     runtime->exclude_regex_valid = false;
231   }
232   if (runtime->function_include_regex_valid) {
233     regfree(&runtime->function_include_regex);
234     runtime->function_include_regex_valid = false;
235   }
236   if (runtime->function_exclude_regex_valid) {
237     regfree(&runtime->function_exclude_regex);
238     runtime->function_exclude_regex_valid = false;
239   }
240 #endif
241 
242   asciichat_instr_only_list_destroy(&runtime->only_selectors);
243   SAFE_FREE(runtime);
244 }

    asciichat_instr_runtime::exclude_regex_valid,

asciichat_instr_runtime_t * asciichat_instr_runtime_get
  (void )


Definition at line 166 of file instrument_log.c.


166                                                              {
167   if (g_disable_write) {
168     return NULL;
169   }
170 
171   // Initialize runtime once using lock-free lifecycle API
172   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_runtime_lc)) {
173     if (lifecycle_init_once(&g_runtime_lc)) {
174       asciichat_instr_runtime_init_once();
175       lifecycle_init_commit(&g_runtime_lc);
176     }
177   }
178 
179   asciichat_instr_runtime_t *runtime = ascii_tls_get(g_runtime_key);
180   if (runtime != NULL) {
181     return runtime;
182   }
183 
184   runtime = SAFE_CALLOC(1, sizeof(*runtime), asciichat_instr_runtime_t *);
185   if (runtime == NULL) {
186     return NULL;
187   }
188 
189   runtime->pid = platform_get_pid();
190   runtime->thread_id = asciichat_thread_current_id();
191   runtime->sequence = 0;
192   runtime->call_counter = 0;
193   runtime->fd = -1;
194   runtime->filter_include = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_INCLUDE");
195   runtime->filter_exclude = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_EXCLUDE");
196   runtime->filter_thread = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_THREAD");
197   runtime->filter_function_include = NULL;
198   runtime->filter_function_exclude = NULL;
199   runtime->filters_enabled = false;
200   runtime->rate = 1;
201   runtime->rate_enabled = false;
202 
203   asciichat_instr_runtime_configure(runtime);
204 
205   if (ascii_tls_set(g_runtime_key, runtime) != 0) {
206     SAFE_FREE(runtime);
207     return NULL;
208   }
209 
210   return runtime;
211 }

    asciichat_thread_current_id(),

    asciichat_instr_runtime::filter_include,

Referenced by asciichat_instr_log_line().






void
  asciichat_instr_runtime_global_destroy (void )


Definition at line 246 of file instrument_log.c.


246                                                   {
247   if (lifecycle_shutdown(&g_runtime_lc)) {
248     g_disable_write = true;
249     ascii_tls_key_delete(g_runtime_key);
250     g_ticks_initialized = false;
251     g_start_ns = 0;
252     g_coverage_enabled = false;
253     g_output_dir_set = false;
254     g_output_dir[0] = '\0';
255     g_instrumentation_enabled_checked = false;
256     g_instrumentation_enabled = false;
257     g_echo_to_stderr_initialized = false;
258     g_echo_to_stderr = false;
259   }
260 
261   // Reset g_disable_write so instrumentation can be re-enabled in subsequent tests
262   g_disable_write = false;
263 }






References ascii_tls_key_delete(), and
    lifecycle_shutdown().
